name: French Cafe Outdoor Folding Patio Accent Armless Chair Beige - Threshold™
description:
Grace your outdoor space with the sophisticated style of this French Cafe Folding Patio Accent Armless Chair from Threshold™. Crafted from a rust- and weather-resistant metal frame, this French cafe armless chair features a woven seat and slatted back in a beige hue for a timeless look. Best of all, this portable armless chair is also foldable for convenient, space-saving storage when not in use.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
